历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 647; in 2023, approximately 505; in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant fluctuation to 4067 (anomalous value); in 2025, the physics category recovered to approximately 643; over the past three normal years, rankings fluctuated between 505 and 647, with a baseline of approximately 643 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia for science/physics category: 44 in 2022, 53 in 2023, 46 in 2024, 54 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 49, a decrease of 5 from 2025, a reduction of about 9.3%, tightening quotas and slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 9th in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2024, rising to 8th in 2025-2026, firmly among the top universities nationwide; in 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents related to campus safety, teacher ethics, and school management (99 signals, 64 negative), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking 19th (high heat), with high attention on short video platforms. In 2025, reputation evaluation was clearly negative (12 negative incidents), with no obvious record of historical admission anomalies; Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Geophysics A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A+, Water Conservancy Engineering A, Biology A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Business Administration A, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with 20 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength. Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended; clinical medicine, stomatology and other medical majors have stable and slightly hot popularity; law is recommended as slightly hot; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 66,000, basically the same as in 2025 (physics category 44,491 + history category 21,406 = 65,897), with no significant change in the competition base.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Wuhan University is located in Hubei, with about 2% of its enrollment in Ningxia (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local preference effects; Ningxia candidates have a high recognition of 985 universities in the Central China region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 643 in 2025, a reduction in enrollment of about 9.3% in 2026 (causing the ranking number to decrease), a somewhat negative reputation (slightly cooling application enthusiasm), and a stable number of candidates, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 622, with a range of 547-697.
